name: Boston
description:
We are meeting in one of the mezzanine meeting rooms, conference room 2. Ask an info desk for directions, but for the idea, they are in the back corner of the second level, above the orange music area.

​From food insecurity and housing struggles to digital autonomy and surveillance capitalism, we believe meaningful change begins at the local level. This Circle is a chance to deepen our connections, follow up on stories raised as we connect, and welcome new members into the conversation.

​Whether you’re ready to contribute or just curious to learn more, you’re invited.
